test_cases.name: happy_path_saas_product_dashboard
test_cases.scenario: Analyze a typical SaaS product dashboard with mixed vanity and actionable metrics, recommend KPI improvements and hierarchy reorganization.

input.dashboard_description: Current dashboard shows: Total Users (1.2M), Page Views (45M/month), Signup Rate (8%), Active Users (320K DAU), Feature Adoption Rate (62%), Churn Rate (3.2%/month), Customer Lifetime Value ($1,200), Revenue ($2.4M/month). Visualizations: line charts for trends, pie charts for segments. Layout: all metrics on one page, no grouping.
input.business_context: SaaS product analytics for growth team and executives. Primary decisions: Should we invest in new features? Are we retaining customers? Is our pricing strategy working?

current_kpis.name: Active Users
current_kpis.definition: Users with activity in last 7 days

current_kpis.name: Churn Rate
current_kpis.definition: Percentage of customers lost per month

input.data_infrastructure_context: Real-time event streaming with 1-hour batch aggregation. 95% data quality. Event latency: 5 minutes.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies Page Views and Total Users as vanity metrics, recommends adding engagement and retention KPIs, reorganizes hierarchy with revenue and churn at top level, designs drill-down paths by segment and feature, maps interdependencies showing Feature Adoption leading to Engagement leading to Retention, assesses data quality for all KPIs, and provides phased implementation plan.

test_cases.name: happy_path_finance_operational_dashboard
test_cases.scenario: Analyze a finance operational dashboard focused on expense tracking and budget management, recommend improvements without experimentation metrics.

input.dashboard_description: Current dashboard displays: Total Expenses ($5.2M YTD), Budget Variance (12% over), Headcount Cost (68% of budget), Travel Expenses ($420K), Office Rent ($180K), Software Licenses ($95K). Visualizations: bar charts by department, stacked area chart for trends. Layout: expenses grouped by category, budget variance highlighted.
input.business_context: Finance operations dashboard for CFO and department heads. Primary decisions: Are we on budget? Which departments are overspending? Where can we cut costs?
input.data_infrastructure_context: Monthly batch updates from accounting system. 98% data quality. 3-day latency from transaction to dashboard.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies that experimentation metrics are not applicable to finance domain, recommends adding cost-per-headcount and burn-rate KPIs, reorganizes hierarchy with budget variance at top level, designs drill-down paths by department and expense category, assesses data quality for accounting data sources, and notes that no experimentation metrics are needed.

test_cases.name: edge_case_minimal_dashboard_description
test_cases.scenario: Process a minimal dashboard description with only 3 metrics and minimal context, gracefully extract what is available and provide recommendations.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill gracefully handles minimal input, documents assumptions about missing context, extracts 3 metrics, infers KPIs from minimal description, recommends adding engagement and retention metrics, provides hierarchy and drill-down suggestions, and notes that data infrastructure context was assumed.

test_cases.name: edge_case_all_metrics_appear_actionable
test_cases.scenario: Analyze a well-designed dashboard where all metrics are already actionable, focus recommendations on hierarchy and drill-down improvements.

input.dashboard_description: Dashboard shows: Monthly Recurring Revenue ($2.4M), Customer Acquisition Cost ($45), Customer Lifetime Value ($1,200), Net Revenue Retention (105%), Monthly Churn Rate (2.8%), Feature Adoption Rate (71%), Engagement Score (7.2/10). All metrics have clear owners and decision thresholds.
input.business_context: Mature SaaS company focused on growth and retention. Decisions: Should we increase marketing spend? Are we building the right features? Is our pricing optimal?

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill documents that dashboard is already well-designed with no vanity metrics, focuses recommendations on improving hierarchy, designing drill-down paths, and mapping metric interdependencies to show how Feature Adoption leads to Engagement leads to Retention leads to Revenue.

test_cases.name: error_handling_missing_data_infrastructure_context
test_cases.scenario: Process dashboard optimization request without data infrastructure context, use conservative assumptions and flag for validation.

input.dashboard_description: Current metrics: Total Signups (5K/day), Active Users (120K), Engagement Score (6.5/10), Revenue ($1.8M/month), Churn Rate (4.2%/month).
input.business_context: Mobile app analytics for product and growth teams.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects missing data infrastructure context, applies conservative assumptions (24-hour batch latency, 90% data quality), flags all KPI recommendations with data feasibility status, recommends interim KPIs using available data, and notes that data infrastructure validation is required before implementation.

test_cases.name: error_handling_kpi_requires_unavailable_data
test_cases.scenario: Recommend KPIs that require data not currently available in the infrastructure, flag as pipeline change and suggest interim alternatives.

input.dashboard_description: Current metrics: Page Views (2M/month), Signup Rate (12%), Active Users (45K). No user cohort or behavioral data available.
input.business_context: Early-stage SaaS with basic analytics. Want to track user retention and engagement.
input.data_infrastructure_context: Basic web analytics only. No user database integration. No event tracking system.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill recommends retention and engagement KPIs but flags them as 'requires data pipeline change', suggests interim KPIs using available page view and signup data, prioritizes data infrastructure improvements in Phase 2 of rollout, and documents specific pipeline changes needed (user database integration, event tracking).

test_cases.name: quality_gate_metrics_interdependency_validation
test_cases.scenario: Verify that metrics interdependency map correctly identifies leading and lagging indicators with specific causality descriptions.

input.dashboard_description: Metrics: Feature Adoption Rate (58%), User Engagement Score (6.8/10), Monthly Retention Rate (87%), Customer Lifetime Value ($950), Revenue ($1.6M/month).
input.business_context: Product analytics for growth-focused SaaS. Need to understand metric relationships.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates interdependency map showing Feature Adoption as leading indicator of Engagement, Engagement as leading indicator of Retention, Retention as leading indicator of Revenue. Each relationship includes specific causality description (e.g., 'Feature adoption increases engagement by 12% within 7 days'). Map is testable and helps stakeholders understand metric causality.

test_cases.name: quality_gate_data_quality_assessment_completeness
test_cases.scenario: Verify that data quality assessment covers all recommended KPIs with quality scores, latency, reliability, and mitigation strategies.

input.dashboard_description: Current metrics: Daily Active Users, Monthly Revenue, Customer Churn Rate, Feature Adoption Rate.
input.business_context: SaaS analytics dashboard for executives and product managers.
input.data_infrastructure_context: Real-time event streaming (5-min latency), 1-hour batch aggregation, 94% data quality, occasional data gaps in geographic dimensions.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill produces data quality assessment for each recommended KPI including: specific data source, quality score (0-100%), latency in hours, reliability percentage, identified risk flags (e.g., 'geographic dimension gaps'), and concrete mitigation strategies. Assessment covers all recommended KPIs and identifies data quality as potential blocker.

test_cases.name: quality_gate_phased_rollout_achieves_quick_wins
test_cases.scenario: Verify that phased rollout plan achieves quick wins in Phase 1 with low-effort, high-impact changes.

input.dashboard_description: Current dashboard: Total Users, Page Views, Signup Rate, Revenue, Churn Rate, Feature Adoption, Engagement Score, Support Tickets, Error Rate.
input.business_context: Mature SaaS with multiple stakeholder groups needing different metrics.
input.data_infrastructure_context: Real-time data available. Multiple data sources with varying latency (5 min to 24 hours).

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill produces phased rollout where Phase 1 includes removing vanity metrics (Page Views, Support Tickets, Error Rate), adding high-impact KPIs using existing data, and reorganizing hierarchy - all achievable in 1-2 weeks. Phase 2 includes drill-down implementation and minor pipeline changes. Phase 3 includes advanced interdependency visualizations and major infrastructure changes.

test_cases.name: error_handling_circular_dependencies_in_interdependency_map
test_cases.scenario: Detect and handle circular dependencies or unclear causality in metrics interdependency map, flag for validation.

input.dashboard_description: Metrics: Customer Satisfaction Score (8.2/10), Product Quality Score (7.9/10), Feature Adoption Rate (65%), Revenue ($2.1M/month). Unclear if satisfaction drives adoption or adoption drives satisfaction.
input.business_context: Product company trying to understand metric relationships.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects potential circular dependency between Satisfaction and Adoption, flags relationship as 'requires validation', suggests A/B testing or statistical analysis to confirm causality direction, documents assumptions explicitly, and recommends deferring this relationship to Phase 2 pending validation.

uncovered_critical_surfaces: Phase 4 - Stakeholder role conflict resolution (requires multi-role scenario)
Phase 6 - Multiple KPIs depend on unreliable data (requires data quality failure scenario)
